title: The Mewoster
description: A cool battle fight in an arena between you... and The Mewoster - a Mysticat Boss made in 3 days :D
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HvZa4lguVRE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Made in 3 days for the [Silly Mysticat Challenge](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f3B0o8uBadc) - And we [won the competition](https://x.com/mysticatMEWO/status/1819856378413945105)!

**Works for 1.21 and 1.21.1!**

Appearing in an arena against The Mewoster, watched by hundreds of cats spectators (and Jimmy the Armadillo), you'll have to ingeniously find the way to kill the boss and dodge it's attacks.

Very cool gameplay. Very cool arena. Awesome animations. Yeah! Don't get killed by Mister Mewoster or you'll be dead :p

mewo!
